Article

Source: Outputs.md

This page summarises outputs related to camtrapReport across Conferences, Workshops, and Publications.

Conferences

Conference presentations, abstracts, and talks related to camtrapReport are listed here.

  • Ebrahimi E, Jansen P (2026) camtrapReport: An R Package for Automating Camera-Trap Data Reporting for Wildlife Monitoring. The International Biogeography Society (TIBS2026),Aarhus, Denmark, 5-10 January 2026.
  • Ebrahimi E, Jansen P (2026) camtrapReport: An R package for automating camera-trap data reporting for wildlife monitoring. Netherlands Annual Ecology Meeting (NAEM 2026), Lunteren, Netherlands, 10–11 February 2026.
  • Ebrahimi E, Stubbe A, Dijkhuis LR, de Knegt HJ, Liefting Y, Jansen PA (2025) Automating camera-trap data reporting for wildlife monitoring. IX European Congress of Mammalogy (ECM9), Patras, Greece, 31 March – 4 April 2025.

Workshops

Workshops, training sessions, and demonstrations related to camtrapReport are listed here.
